title: Timers  stop outside of working hours

posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I saw that there was a post from last year about this but I was hoping that there is a new solution (the one presented is not applicable to my use).

We have four different timers, including one for the downtime of a product. However, the timers are not relevant if they cannot be stoped during the weekend or any public holidays.

Has anoyne found a way to do this ?

Thank you in advance!
